M1840_CUR_TOILTG M1840 Toilet Transferring This field indicates the patient's current ability to get to and from toilet or bedside commode safely and transfer
on and off toilet/commode. 00 = Able to get to and from the toilet and transfer independently with or
without a device.
01 = When reminded, assisted, or supervised by another person, able to get to and from the toilet and
